name: LSA Security Packages & Authentication
categoryDescription: Registry keys that cause code to execute at boot, logon, or via Windows subsystem hooks.
description: LSA SSPs, authentication packages, and notification packages — each listed DLL loads into lsass.exe.
forensic_value: Malicious SSPs persist across reboots within LSASS. Any unexpected DLL in Security Packages is critical IOC — Mimikatz mimilib.dll SSP installs here.
